calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Katy Independent School District in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 11, 2027. Fall Break arrives quickly — October 8–12, about eight weeks into the year, with a student holiday on September 17 arriving even earlier. New Katy ISD families often underestimate how many short gaps appear in the first semester. Mark September and October on your childcare calendar before the year begins.

calendarFaqs.q: When does the spring semester start in Katy ISD in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Katy ISD students return for the spring semester on Wednesday, January 4, 2028. Monday, January 3 is a student holiday — classes don't resume until Wednesday even though Winter Break officially ends December 31. Return-from-holiday travel should be planned for Sunday, January 2 to be ready for the Wednesday start.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Katy Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Katy ISD Spring Break runs March 13–17, 2028. The Easter holiday is separate: Good Friday and Easter Monday fall April 14–17 — four weeks later. A trip planned around Spring Break week won't cover Easter, and vice versa. Check both windows before booking travel or arranging childcare.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Katy ISD in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, May 24, 2028, with early dismissal. At 172 instructional days, Katy ISD's year ends roughly a week earlier than most Texas districts that run 180 days. Families enrolling in summer programs that start the Monday after school ends will have more lead time than in neighboring districts.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Katy ISD winter break 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs December 20, 2027 through December 31. Monday, January 3 is a student holiday, so the first day of spring semester classes is Wednesday, January 4. The effective school-free period runs just under three weeks. Plan return travel for Sunday, January 2.

yearNumbers.label: Labor Day Extended
yearNumbers.detail: Sep 7 is a student holiday immediately after Labor Day, extending the long weekend to Saturday–Tuesday — same pattern as 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday + Easter
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday and Easter Monday are both school holidays, creating a four-day Easter break — consistent with the 2026–2027 calendar.

events.name: Early Dismissal and End of Fall Semester
Early Dismissal and Last Day of School

calendarNotes: Katy ISD begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 11, 2027. Fall Break runs October 8–12, Thanksgiving Break runs November 22–26, and Winter Break extends from December 20 through December 31. Students return for the spring semester on January 4, 2028, following a student holiday on January 3. Spring Break is March 13–17, followed by a student and staff holiday from April 14–17. The school year ends with early dismissal on May 24, 2028. The calendar includes 172 instructional days and enough instructional minutes to cover two bad-weather days.
